ocr_findings.location: page_475 — translated/page_475.json contains only 1 figure entity (caption 'LANとWAN').
ocr_findings.jp_actual: OCR (ocr/page_475.md) contains substantial body text on LAN/WAN definition, ISP discussion (~18 lines).
ocr_findings.jp_expected: Body text dropped; only the figure caption is emitted. Consistent with R6 design for visual-heavy textbook pages where the body text is duplicated elsewhere.

translation_findings.issue: ZH '与' is a literal mapping of と; acceptable. Some style guides prefer '和'. Non-blocking.
